title: Gartner (IT) Up 3.2% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Gartner (IT) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Gartner (IT) Benefits From Diversified Addressable Market
text: Gartner (IT), with a diverse market and integrated teams, excels in a low-entry-barrier industry, ensuring consistent growth.

title: Gartner to Participate in the Goldman Sachs Communacopia + Technology Conference
text: STAMFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) today announced that Craig Safian, EVP & CFO, will participate in a fireside chat at the Goldman Sachs Communacopia + Technology Conference. Gartner's fireside chat is scheduled for 7:30 am Pacific Time on Wednesday, September 6, 2023. A link to the live webcast of the fireside chat will be available via the Company's web site at https://investor.gartner.com. A replay of the webcast will be available for approximately 30 days follow.

title: 7 Best Reddit Stocks to Buy Now
text: Reddit's WallStreetBets forum took GameStop stock to unfathomable heights last year, ushering in the meme stock era. Though the retail trading frenzy has dulled considerably, the best Reddit stocks remain as relevant as ever.

title: Gartner (IT) Surpasses Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Gartner's (IT) revenues increase year over year in the second quarter of 2023 driven by improvement in segmental results.

title: Compared to Estimates, Gartner (IT) Q2 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Gartner (IT) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Gartner (IT) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Gartner (IT) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.85 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.48 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.85 per share a year ago.

title: Gartner Reports Second Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: STAMFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) today reported results for the second quarter of 2023 and updated its financial outlook for the full year 2023.
